_comment: Style guides appended to your prompt with --style NAME[,NAME2]. Each adds 'prompt' to the positive and 'negative' to the negative prompt. SDXL honors (term:weight) emphasis. Add your own entries here.

clean.prompt: clean modern pixel art, crisp pixels, clear outlines, flat shading

detailed.prompt: detailed pixel art, intricate shading, rich colors, careful dithering

minimal.prompt: minimal pixel art, few colors, simple shapes, lots of empty space

8bit.prompt: 8-bit, NES style, limited palette, chunky pixels, simple bold shapes

16bit.prompt: 16-bit, SNES style, detailed sprite, vibrant colors, smooth shading

gameboy.prompt: Game Boy style, 4-shade monochrome green, chunky low-res sprite

geometric.prompt: (sharp angular geometric shapes:1.3), hard straight edges, bold faceted forms, jagged spiky silhouette, high contrast
geometric.negative: rounded, smooth curves, soft, organic, blobby, fuzzy, noodly limbs

outline.prompt: bold dark outline, thick clean outline, strong readable silhouette

cute.prompt: cute chibi, big head, small rounded body, adorable mascot

dark.prompt: dark, gritty, eerie, muted desaturated palette, heavy shadows, ominous mood

horror.prompt: horror, creepy, unsettling, grotesque, menacing, body-horror

hyperlight.prompt: in the style of Hyper Light Drifter, vibrant neon, minimal, sharp, atmospheric

deadcells.prompt: in the style of Dead Cells, fluid detailed sprite, glowing rim light, dynamic pose

blasphemous.prompt: in the style of Blasphemous, gothic, ornate, dark, highly detailed

owlboy.prompt: in the style of Owlboy, polished hi-bit pixel art, colorful, smooth shading

stardew.prompt: in the style of Stardew Valley, cozy, soft, charming farm-RPG sprite
